# Filesystem

Low-level file operations — MIME type detection and inotify-based file watching. A utility context without full DDD layer structure.

## Concepts

- **MimeDetector** implements `MimeDetectorPortInterface` — used by Catalog (cover uploads) and Media (stream serving) to detect file content types
- **FileWatcher** wraps inotify to watch directories for changes, emitting `FileWatchEvent`s
- **WatchFilesCommand** — console command to start the file watcher

## Ports

| Port | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `MimeDetectorPortInterface` | MIME type detection |
